title: Subitems visibility in connected boards via item card widget
excerpt: We’re using the connected board feature along with an item card. However, we’re unable to view the subtasks of connected tasks. While we can see that subtasks exist and can even add new ones, they remain invisible

posts.author: liorH (lior herling)
posts.cookedHtml: We’re using the connected board feature along with an item card. However, we’re unable to view the subtasks of connected tasks. While we can see that subtasks exist and can even add new ones, they remain invisible

posts.author: abuislam (abuislam)
posts.cookedHtml: It would be really helpful if the visibility of subtasks in connected boards via the item card widget could be improved. Being able to view and manage subtasks directly from the connected tasks would streamline workflow and enhance productivity. Hopefully, this can be addressed in a future update!

posts.author: jonasf (Jonas Fürstenberg)
posts.cookedHtml:
The problem is essentially, that the preview card build into monday, when 2 boards are connected, you have no way of knowing how many subitems there are or which ones they are, you will always have to access the original board to see with really disrupts the workflow

posts.author: jonasf (Jonas Fürstenberg)
posts.cookedHtml: I have the same problem and am looking for the same feature
